200.description: Job scheduled (or completed if run immediately)

schema.description: Result or current status of a transformation job

correlationId.description: Unique ID for this job — use to poll `/status/{correlationId}`

fileName.description: Original file name (populated for file-upload jobs)

totalRecords.description: Total records found in the source file

failedRecords.description: Records that failed validation and were skipped (when skipInvalidRecords=true)

correctedRecords.description: Records that were auto-corrected before publishing

sequenceNumber.description: 1-based line/record number in the source file

field.description: Field name that caused the error (null for record-level errors)

severity.description: Severity level of a validation error
severity.title: Severity

schema.title: TransformResponse

schema.description: Standard error envelope returned by all error responses

path.description: Request path that produced the error

schema.title: ErrorResponse

schema.description: Standard error envelope returned by all error responses

path.description: Request path that produced the error

schema.title: ErrorResponse
